welcome.title: Welcome to Vivid
welcome.subtitle: Your private, on-device media library. Let's set up a few things — you can change any of this later in Settings.
welcome.personalizeDesc: These come with sensible defaults — adjust only what you like.
welcome.aiDesc: Download the on-device AI model to search your library by meaning — find “sunset on the beach” without tagging a thing. Everything stays on your Mac.
welcome.aiModelMeta: Runs locally · large one-time download (~1.5 GB)
welcome.aiNote: No rush — you can download this anytime from Settings › AI.
welcome.toolsDesc: Powers downloading from links. If you already have it installed, Vivid uses yours — otherwise you can grab it here.
welcome.toolsNote: Optional — skip and download later from Settings whenever you need them.

workspace.title: Where should your library live?
workspace.desc: You can change this later in Settings.
workspace.defaultDesc: Vivid manages your library for you.
workspace.externalDesc: Point Vivid at a folder you already have — nothing is copied, and the folder becomes portable to another device.
workspace.chooseTitle: Choose a folder to use as your library

tools.ffmpegDesc: Optional — enables legacy video playback (wmv/avi/flv/mkv) and higher-quality link downloads.

imagePicker.title: Choose cover for "{{name}}"
imagePicker.empty: No images in your library yet.

collection.descriptionPlaceholder: Add a description… (⌘↵ to save, Esc to cancel)

contextMenu.deleteCollectionMsg: Delete "{{name}}"? Media in this collection will be unassigned but not deleted.
contextMenu.deleteFolderMsg: Delete "{{name}}"? Its files will be moved to Other, not deleted.

general.homePageDesc: The view shown when Vivid opens.
general.moodBarDesc: Show a filter bar below the toolbar to browse your library by mood or vibe.
general.moodBarRequiresAI: Requires Visual AI to be enabled.
general.sidebarCountsDesc: Display counts next to library, folder, and album entries.
general.syncIntro: One-way sync: Vivid copies your library files into the chosen folder and keeps them up to date, but never changes your library based on the folder. Point it at a cloud-synced folder (iCloud Drive, Dropbox) to back up your files and reach them from other devices.
general.syncFolderNoFolder: No folder selected — choose a local folder, mounted drive, or a cloud-synced folder (iCloud Drive, Dropbox).
general.autoBackupDesc: Automatically sync your library to the folder on the chosen schedule.
general.syncIntervalDesc: How often Vivid should sync the library while it's open.
general.syncHistoryDesc: View sync results and system event log.
general.mediaToolsDesc: Optional helper for downloading from links. Vivid prefers a system install if you have one; otherwise it manages its own private copy.

appearance.languageDesc: Override the system language for Vivid's interface.
appearance.pinnedDesc: Type a new position number to reorder your pinned collections in the sidebar.
appearance.noPinned: No pinned collections yet. Pin a collection from its page.

library.watchedFoldersDesc: Vivid scans these folders on startup and imports any new files it finds into your library. This is a one-way import — files flow from the folder into Vivid. Useful for iCloud Drive, Dropbox, a camera SD card, or any other location where files land automatically.
library.fileSyncDesc: One-way backup: Vivid copies your library files out to the chosen folder and keeps them up to date, but never changes your library based on the folder. Point it at a cloud-synced folder (iCloud Drive, Dropbox) to back up your files and reach them from other devices. Unlike Watched Folders, this is outbound only — files flow from Vivid to the folder, not the other way around.
library.removeFolderConfirm: Stop watching "{{folder}}"? Files already imported from it stay in your library.
library.searchHistoryDesc: Remember recent searches and show suggestions.
library.autoDeleteDesc: Trashed items older than this are permanently deleted on startup.

sync.desc: Keeps each destination folder as an exact mirror of your library, in real time. One-way: changes in the library are pushed out immediately and files removed from the library are removed from the mirror. A destination is owned by Vivid — anything there that isn't in your library will be removed. You can add up to {{max}} destinations. Once enabled, a sync is locked; delete it to reconfigure.
sync.noDestination: No folder chosen — pick an external drive or a cloud-synced folder.
sync.nonEmptyWarn: This folder isn't empty. Mirroring will REMOVE any files in it that aren't part of your library. Continue?
sync.duplicateDest: That folder is already used by another sync.
sync.maxReached: Maximum of {{max}} sync destinations reached. Delete one to add another.
sync.deleteConfirm: Delete this sync? Files already copied to the destination are left in place.
sync.statusOffline: Destination unavailable — will resume automatically when it reconnects.
sync.statusError: Something went wrong — see the system log.
sync.pullInDesc: When you add a new file to the destination, import it into the library. Only new files are pulled in — edits and deletions in the destination are reverted.
sync.foldersDesc: Choose which library folders to mirror.

ai.semanticDesc: Powers search by meaning, mood filtering, auto-tagging, and Find Similar. Requires a one-time model download (~1.5 GB) and runs fully on-device.
ai.visualAIDesc: Search by meaning, auto-tag photos, filter by mood, and find visually similar images. Works in 100+ languages. Runs fully on your device — nothing is sent to the cloud.
ai.activeDesc: Active — semantic search, auto-tagging, mood filters, and Find Similar are available.
ai.indexLibraryDesc: Generate AI embeddings and auto-tags for all un-indexed photos and videos.

ocr.title: Text in photos
ocr.desc: Recognize text inside your photos (screenshots, documents, signs) so it becomes searchable. Runs on your device — no download required.

about.tagline: A local media file manager for your photos, videos, and audio.

workspace.desc: Vivid stores your library in its own app data folder by default. You can instead point it at an existing folder — files are indexed in place, in a hidden .vivid folder inside it. Nothing is ever copied, converted, or duplicated: thumbnails and format-converted previews are cached in Vivid's own app data folder instead, never written near your files.
workspace.chooseTitle: Choose a folder to use as a workspace
workspace.switchConfirm: Vivid needs to restart to switch to "{{name}}". Any unsaved changes in other views will be lost.
workspace.unlinkConfirm: This only forgets "{{name}}" in Vivid — its folder and everything inside it (including its database) is left untouched on disk.
workspace.unlinkActiveConfirm: Vivid needs to restart to switch to another workspace after unlinking "{{name}}". Its folder and everything inside it (including its database) is left untouched on disk.
workspace.devRestartNeeded: Workspace switched. Restart the dev server (not just this window) to apply it — automatic restart doesn’t work in `tauri dev`.
workspace.fixPathDesc: Vivid can't find this workspace's folder anymore. Choose its new location (or where you moved it to) to reconnect it.

trash.title: Trash
trash.retentionBannerAfter: You can change this in Library settings.
trash.retentionNeverBanner: Trashed items are kept until you delete them manually. You can enable auto-delete in Library settings.
trash.confirmRestore_one: {{count}} item will be moved back to your library.
trash.confirmRestore_other: {{count}} items will be moved back to your library.
trash.confirmEmpty_one: {{count}} item ({{size}}) will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
trash.confirmEmpty_other: {{count}} items ({{size}}) will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
trash.confirmDelete: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted from your library and removed from disk. This cannot be undone.
trash.nothingInTrashDesc: Items you delete from your library appear here before being permanently removed.
trash.moveMsg: The file will be moved to Trash and automatically deleted after the configured retention period.
trash.moveManyMsg_one: Move {{count}} file to Trash? It will be permanently deleted after the configured retention period.
trash.moveManyMsg_other: Move {{count}} files to Trash? They will be permanently deleted after the configured retention period.
trash.confirmRestoreItem: "{{name}}" will be moved back to your library.

sysmsgs.title: System Messages
sysmsgs.clearAllConfirmDesc: This will permanently remove all system messages.
sysmsgs.noSysmsgsDesc: Events like backups, imports, and errors will appear here.

music.title: Music
music.noAudioHint: Import MP3, FLAC, AAC, WAV, or M4A files to get started.
music.noTracksYet: No audio tracks yet. Right-click an audio file and use "Move to Collection" to add tracks here.

mediaGrid.noFilesDesc: Import photos, videos, or audio to get started
mediaGrid.noResultsDesc: No files match your current search or filters

map.empty: No geotagged photos or videos found.
map.emptyHint: Import images with GPS EXIF data to see them on the map.

stats.empty: Import some files to see library stats.
stats.noTagsYet: No tags yet. Add tags to your files in the detail panel.
stats.subtitle: {{count}} items · {{size}} · {{collections}} collections

keyboard.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboard.selectPrevNext: Select previous / next item in grid
keyboard.escapeDesc: Deselect / close viewer / exit edit mode
keyboard.doubleClickDesc: Open file in viewer / audio player

screenshot.permissionMessage:
Vivid needs Screen Recording permission to take screenshots.

Go to System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording, then enable Vivid and restart the app.

sort.saveAsManualMsg: Save the current order as this playlist's manual order? You can then drag to rearrange items.

upload.title: Receive from Phone
upload.intro: Start a temporary upload link, then scan the QR code with a phone on the same Wi-Fi to send photos, videos, and audio straight into your library.
upload.secExplicit: Only runs while this window is open

importConfirm.title: Confirm import
importConfirm.skipDupe: {{count}} duplicate will be skipped (already in library)
importConfirm.skipDupe_other: {{count}} duplicates will be skipped (already in library)

notif.title: Notifications
notif.duplicateFolder: A folder named "{{name}}" already exists here
notif.moveToCollectionFailed_one: {{count}} file couldn't be moved (incompatible with collection)
notif.moveToCollectionFailed_other: {{count}} files couldn't be moved (incompatible with collection)
notif.noGeotaggedInAlbum: No geotagged images in this album to show on the map.

search.placeholder: Search by name, tag, or description…

detail.title: Details
detail.name: Name
detail.retagHint: Re-run AI tagging for this item
detail.noConfidentTags: No confident tags found — kept existing tags
detail.setLocationHint: Click anywhere on the map to place a pin, or drag the pin to fine-tune it.

download.title: Download from URL
download.ytdlpHint: Supports YouTube, SoundCloud, Spotify, and 1000+ sites via yt-dlp. Requires yt-dlp (brew install yt-dlp).
download.playlistHint: Paste a playlist or album URL. yt-dlp will download every track. This may take a while.
download.folderExists: A folder with that name already exists

compare.title: Side-by-Side View
compare.syncHint: Sync zoom & pan with the left image

imageEditor.saveChangesMsg: This permanently overwrites the original file on disk and cannot be undone.
imageEditor.unsavedChangesMsg: You have unsaved edits. Save before leaving, or discard them?

viewer.transcodeFailed: Couldn't convert this video for playback
viewer.trimDragHint: Drag the handles to trim, play to preview
viewer.trimReplaceConfirm: The original video will be permanently replaced with the trimmed version. This can't be undone.

icloud.title: Import from iCloud Photos
icloud.body: Vivid imports directly from your local Photos Library — the one synced with iCloud Photos.
icloud.step1: Open Photos → Settings → iCloud and choose Download Originals to this Mac so full-resolution files are available locally.
icloud.step3: If macOS asks, grant Vivid access to your Photos Library.
icloud.note: Large libraries can take a while. Originals are copied into Vivid; your Photos library is left unchanged.

googlePhotos.title: Import from Google Photos
googlePhotos.body: Google Photos doesn't support direct desktop sync. To import your library:
googlePhotos.step1: Go to takeout.google.com and sign in.
googlePhotos.step2: Select Google Photos, then click Next step → Create export.
googlePhotos.step3: Download and extract the ZIP file(s).
googlePhotos.step4: Click Choose Folder below and select the extracted folder.
googlePhotos.note: Vivid will import all photos and videos from the folder. JSON sidecar files are skipped automatically.

duplicates.title: Duplicate Files
duplicates.noDuplicatesDesc: All files in your library have unique content.
duplicates.hint: Click a card to toggle keep/delete. At least one must be kept per group.

selection.noCompatibleCollections: No compatible collections for this selection

massTag.placeholder: Type a tag and press Enter…
massTag.mergeHint: These tags will be merged with each file's existing tags.

exportModal.exportToFolderDesc: Copy files to a folder you choose
exportModal.exportAsZipDesc: Bundle all files into a single ZIP archive

renameFile.conflictHint_one: {{count}} file name would conflict — fix it before renaming.
renameFile.conflictHint_other: {{count}} file names would conflict — fix them before renaming.

workspacePicker.title: Which workspace?
workspacePicker.desc: You have more than one workspace set up. Pick one to continue.
workspacePicker.pathMissing: That workspace's folder can't be found — it may have been moved, renamed, or is on a drive that isn't connected. You can fix its path from Settings once you're in the app.
workspacePicker.unavailableDesc: "{{name}}"'s folder can no longer be found — it may have been removed, renamed, or unmounted. Vivid needs to restart to recover.
